mpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/207704.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害双向提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害结果提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害结果降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【少年英雄的修行之旅。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「听说卡奇那孩子最近带着多乐丝他们在折腾什么事情，你听说了吗？」一大早，格雷端着茶杯走到麦琪身边说道。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「什……怎么了？」正准备去冲泡咖啡的麦琪愣在了原地，「发生什么事了吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"于是格雷将「少年异格者小队」的事情告诉了麦琪。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「少年……异格者小队？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「嗯，据说是卡奇要成为英雄的启程之旅。昨天他兴高采烈地来找我说了两个小时，说是要加强训练，早日加入特别行动组。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「哦？那你答应他了吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「哪能啊·……卡奇和多乐丝可是小孩子，我怎么能轻易破坏他们的美好童年？不过我陪他试了试新武器，倒是激发了他新的兴趣。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「比如？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那孩子说自己『身为英雄，不仅要学会挥剑斩断敌人，也要学会举盾保护朋友』。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「想法不错嘛。卡奇的天赋很好，炼也曾思考过是否等到他年纪再大一些就开始培养他。未来的确有望让特别行动组再添一名新星了。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【戌守卡奇在此，请见证！】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"以下内容节选自卡奇的修行日志："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"日期:9月23日"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"天气：晴转多云"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"心情：一开始不好，后来好了"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"今天是「少年异格者小队」组建成功的第七天纪念日，是个非常值得铭记的日子，因为在今天的训练中，我成功防守住了格雷老师的攻势，还完成了一套合格的防守动作练习。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"为了纪念这个伟大的时刻，我要为自己更名为「戌守卡奇」！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"我还记得格雷老师问过我，为什么要组建这个小队，我很骄傲地告诉他，因为我要保护我的朋友，保护协会，保护整个伊瑟！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"就像那些漫画书和动画片的超级英雄一样！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"虽然现在的我还是只能练习如何防守，但格雷老师说了，防守正是成为英雄必要的技能，因为没有人能保证每一个弱者都有保卫自己不受伤害的能力，所以就必须有人站出来保护他们。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"『身为英雄，不仅要学会挥剑斩断敌人，也要学会举盾保护朋友』，这是格雷老师教会我的，我要将这句话作为小队的行动方针，还要让千明设计成横幅悬挂起来。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"又及，今天出门时忘记带伞。淋湿了新买的衣服，但看在收获很多的份上原谅了一切。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"少年异格者小队万岁！"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【少年异格者小队，集结！】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「突然请大家吃好吃的……哦·……我知道了，卡奇你肯定又犯什么错了吧！」多乐丝好奇地问。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这个风和日丽的午后，卡奇用两块，小，蛋，糕，为引子，邀请多乐丝和米娅两人来到了协会总部的活动室中。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「才不是犯错呢！是因为我有一个很伟大的想法要付诸实现！」卡奇兴高采烈地在身后的黑板上写画，米娅和多乐丝则一脸期待。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「少年……异格者小队？」米娅念出了黑板上堪称幼稚的笔迹。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「没错！这将是一支英雄的小队！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「哇，听起来好厉害。」多乐丝拍了拍手，「那成员都是谁呢？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「咳咳·……」卡奇故作神秘地顿了顿，「虽然现在我们小队还只是初级阶段……但现在已经有我、多乐丝你，还有米娅，三个核心成员了！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「好耶！那么我们什么时候开始行动！」米娅从椅子上跳了起来，仿佛下一秒就要出发。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「没有大人的帮助，只靠我们真的能成功吗？」多乐丝有些担心。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你放心，有我这位未来的超级英雄领队，一切困难都将被克服！」卡奇举起手臂指向远方，「总有一天，我们也会成为特别行动组的核心干员！」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"免疫，推条"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 115|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性3命中加成 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 数值要求 | 效果命中170左右 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"有着免疫防御的强力辅助效果，同时2技能的推条能让队伍出手更多次。适合打boss附加异常的关卡，比如智壳的莎朗副本"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.40c2363e9c1fe","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12疾驰+8奋进+6讯光天击"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.01e16842bb3ed","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"万魔法典"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.607ed15092015","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_283/h_300/50364/842288/2025/7/18/497190.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"XoIWcAuJZ3krBmyN","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
